verses.latin_vulgate: Mitte panem tuum super transeuntes aquas,  quia post tempora multa invenies illum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁלַּ֥ח לַחְמְךָ֖ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י הַמָּ֑יִם כִּֽי־בְרֹ֥ב הַיָּמִ֖ים תִּמְצָאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Cast thy bread upon the waters: for thou shalt find it after many days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Da partem septem necnon et octo,  quia ignoras quid futurum sit mali super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֶּן־חֵ֥לֶק לְשִׁבְעָ֖ה וְגַ֣ם לִשְׁמוֹנָ֑ה כִּ֚י לֹ֣א תֵדַ֔ע מַה־יִּהְיֶ֥ה רָעָ֖ה עַל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Give a portion to seven, and also to eight; for thou knowest not what evil shall be upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si repletæ fuerint nubes,  imbrem super terram effundent.  Si ceciderit lignum ad austrum aut ad aquilonem,  in quocumque loco ceciderit, ibi erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יִמָּלְא֨וּ הֶעָבִ֥ים גֶּ֙שֶׁם֙ עַל־הָאָ֣רֶץ יָרִ֔יקוּ וְאִם־יִפּ֥וֹל עֵ֛ץ בַּדָּר֖וֹם וְאִ֣ם בַּצָּפ֑וֹן מְק֛וֹם שֶׁיִּפּ֥וֹל הָעֵ֖ץ שָׁ֥ם יְהֽוּא׃
verses.king_james: If the clouds be full of rain, they empty themselves upon the earth: and if the tree fall toward the south, or toward the north, in the place where the tree falleth, there it shall be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui observat ventum non seminat ;  et qui considerat nubes numquam metet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׁמֵ֥ר ר֖וּחַ לֹ֣א יִזְרָ֑ע וְרֹאֶ֥ה בֶעָבִ֖ים לֹ֥א יִקְצֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: He that observeth the wind shall not sow; and he that regardeth the clouds shall not reap.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo ignoras quæ sit via spiritus,  et qua ratione compingantur ossa in ventre prægnantis,  sic nescis opera Dei,  qui fabricator est omnium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר אֵֽינְךָ֤ יוֹדֵ֙עַ֙ מַה־דֶּ֣רֶךְ הָר֔וּחַ כַּעֲצָמִ֖ים בְּבֶ֣טֶן הַמְּלֵאָ֑ה כָּ֗כָה לֹ֤א תֵדַע֙ אֶת־מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר יַעֲשֶׂ֖ה אֶת־הַכֹּֽל׃
verses.king_james: As thou knowest not what is the way of the spirit, nor how the bones do grow in the womb of her that is with child: even so thou knowest not the works of God who maketh all.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mane semina semen tuum,  et vespere ne cesset manus tua :  quia nescis quid magis oriatur, hoc aut illud ;  et si utrumque simul, melius erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּבֹּ֙קֶר֙ זְרַ֣ע אֶת־זַרְעֶ֔ךָ וְלָעֶ֖רֶב אַל־תַּנַּ֣ח יָדֶ֑ךָ כִּי֩ אֵֽינְךָ֨ יוֹדֵ֜עַ אֵ֣י זֶ֤ה יִכְשָׁר֙ הֲזֶ֣ה אוֹ־זֶ֔ה וְאִם־שְׁנֵיהֶ֥ם כְּאֶחָ֖ד טוֹבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: In the morning sow thy seed, and in the evening withhold not thine hand: for thou knowest not whether shall prosper, either this or that, or whether they both shall be alike good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dulce lumen,  et delectabile est oculis videre solem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָת֖וֹק הָא֑וֹר וְט֥וֹב לַֽעֵינַ֖יִם לִרְא֥וֹת אֶת־הַשָּֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Truly the light is sweet, and a pleasant thing it is for the eyes to behold the sun:

verses.latin_vulgate: Si annis multis vixerit homo,  et in his omnibus lætatus fuerit,  meminisse debet tenebrosi temporis, et dierum multorum,  qui cum venerint, vanitatis arguentur præterita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אִם־שָׁנִ֥ים הַרְבֵּ֛ה יִחְיֶ֥ה הָאָדָ֖ם בְּכֻלָּ֣ם יִשְׂמָ֑ח וְיִזְכֹּר֙ אֶת־יְמֵ֣י הַחֹ֔שֶׁךְ כִּֽי־הַרְבֵּ֥ה יִהְי֖וּ כׇּל־שֶׁבָּ֥א הָֽבֶל׃
verses.king_james: But if a man live many years, and rejoice in them all; yet let him remember the days of darkness; for they shall be many. All that cometh is vanity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætare ergo, juvenis, in adolescentia tua,  et in bono sit cor tuum in diebus juventutis tuæ :  et ambula in viis cordis tui,  et in intuitu oculorum tuorum,  et scito quod pro omnibus his adducet te Deus in judicium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂמַ֧ח בָּח֣וּר בְּיַלְדוּתֶ֗יךָ וִֽיטִֽיבְךָ֤ לִבְּךָ֙ בִּימֵ֣י בְחוּרוֹתֶ֔יךָ וְהַלֵּךְ֙ בְּדַרְכֵ֣י לִבְּךָ֔ וּבְמַרְאֵ֖י עֵינֶ֑יךָ וְדָ֕ע כִּ֧י עַל־כׇּל־אֵ֛לֶּה יְבִֽיאֲךָ֥ הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: Rejoice, O young man, in thy youth; and let thy heart cheer thee in the days of thy youth, and walk in the ways of thine heart, and in the sight of thine eyes: but know thou, that for all these things God will bring thee into judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aufer iram a corde tuo,  et amove malitiam a carne tua :  adolescentia enim et voluptas vana sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָסֵ֥ר כַּ֙עַס֙ מִלִּבֶּ֔ךָ וְהַעֲבֵ֥ר רָעָ֖ה מִבְּשָׂרֶ֑ךָ כִּֽי־הַיַּלְד֥וּת וְהַֽשַּׁחֲר֖וּת הָֽבֶל׃
verses.king_james: Therefore remove sorrow from thy heart, and put away evil from thy flesh: for childhood and youth are vanity.
